title: thoracosperma oblonga
intro: Thoracosperma oblonga is a plant species, also known as the Australian chestnut, that belongs to the family Rutaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thoracosperma oblonga include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin infections and respiratory issues.
